hooks.command: case "$TOOL_INPUT" in *biome.json*|*oxlintrc.json*|*tsconfig.json*|*lefthook.yml*) echo 'BLOCKED: Protected config file. Edit manually if needed.' && exit 2 ;; esac

filepath=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE '"file_path":\s*"[^"]+"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":\s*"//;s/"$//'); case "$filepath" in *.ts|*.tsx) npx biome check --write "$filepath" 2>&1 && npx oxlint "$filepath" 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0
